sys_remote_update_set.name: ITSM Demo - Portal Widgets & Reports
sys_remote_update_set.description: Service Portal Widgets (Incident Creator, My Group Incidents, KB Browser) and ITSM Demo Dashboard. Part 3 of 3.

sp_widget.name: incident-creator
sp_widget.title: Report an Incident
sp_widget.description: Service Portal widget for end users to submit new incidents with category and description.
sp_widget.template:
Report an Incident
Incident Created Successfully!

Your incident number is: {{c.data.incident_number}}

{{c.errorMessage}}

sp_widget.name: my-group-incidents
sp_widget.title: My Group Incidents
sp_widget.description: Displays incidents assigned to the current user's groups. For L1 agents who can only see their own group's incidents.
sp_widget.template:
My Group Incidents Groups: {{g}}{{$last ? '' : ', '}}

No active incidents assigned to your groups.

NumberShort DescriptionStatePriorityCategoryAssigned ToCreated
{{inc.number}} {{inc.short_description}} {{inc.stateDisplay}} P{{inc.priority}} {{inc.category}} {{inc.assigned_to || 'Unassigned'}} {{inc.created_on | date:'short'}}

sp_widget.name: knowledge-article-browser
sp_widget.title: Knowledge Base
sp_widget.description: Service Portal widget for browsing knowledge articles from both Technical and Employee KBs.
sp_widget.template:
Knowledge Base

No articles found.

{{article.short_description}}
{{article.kb_name}} {{article.category || 'Uncategorized'}} {{article.author}} - {{article.created_on | date:'mediumDate'}}

pa_dashboards.name: ITSM Demo Dashboard
pa_dashboards.description: Main ITSM Demo Dashboard showing incident metrics, problem trends, change overview, and SLA performance.

pa_report.name: Incidents by Category
pa_report.description: Shows the distribution of incidents across different categories (Hardware, Software, Network, Others).

pa_report.name: Incidents by Priority
pa_report.description: Shows the breakdown of incidents by priority level.

pa_report.name: Incidents Over Time
pa_report.description: Shows incident creation trends over time.

pa_report.name: Incidents by Group
pa_report.description: Shows incident distribution across support groups.

pa_report.name: Open Incidents List
pa_report.description: List of all currently open incidents.

pa_report.name: SLA Breaches
pa_report.description: Count of SLA breaches by SLA definition.

pa_report.name: Incident Category-Priority Matrix
pa_report.description: Stacked bar chart showing category distribution by priority.

pa_report.name: Problems by State
pa_report.description: Shows the current state distribution of problems.

pa_report.name: Changes by Type
pa_report.description: Breakdown of change requests by type.

pa_report.name: Changes Over Time
pa_report.description: Shows change request creation trends over time.
